name: Cotizador Abbate
tagline: Quotation management system for a marble and stonework company
description: A full-stack quotation management platform built for a marble and stonework company. Handles the complete workflow from client management to quotation creation, versioning, and PDF generation. Features role-based access for admins and sellers with OTP authentication.
highlights: Complete quotation lifecycle: draft, quoted, sold, lost
Role-based access control with OTP two-factor authentication
PDF generation from quotations using html2canvas and jsPDF
